description: Artificial Daffodils bunch with 9 individual stems of realistic yellow Daffodil flowers. Overall bunch height 33cm (13 inch), flower heads 11cm (4.25 inches) diameter. Internally wired stems retain the desired shape. Stems do not have any leaves. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
